news.t: YieldMax® Launches New Fund Family Focused on Growth + Income: Performance and Distribution Target 25™ ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TEST is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax TSLA Performance & Distribution Target 25 ETF (TEST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund targets an annual 25% distribution level through a combination of synthetic long exposure to Tesla (TSLA) stock and options strategies to generate premiums. TEST was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.
